zh.lifeSummary: 當Eustache Ier comte de Boulogne於1004年8月11日出生在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯布洛-素-梅時，他的父親Count Baldwin Of Boulogne II29歲，母親Adelheid van Gent24歲。他與Mathilde gravin van Leuven在比利時布拉班特結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1049年10月15日在他的家鄉享年45歲，埋葬在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Eustache Ier comte de Boulogne于1004年8月11日出生在法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯布洛-素-梅时，他的父亲Count Baldwin Of Boulogne II29岁，母亲Adelheid van Gent24岁。他与Mathilde gravin van Leuven在比利时布拉班特结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1049年10月15日在他的家乡享年45岁，埋葬在法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯。

nameMeanings.name: comte
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Jean Jacques.

nickname for someone in the service of a count or for someone who behaved pretentiously, from Old French conte, cunte ‘count’. In North America, this surname is also a shortened form of the French cognate Lecomte . Compare Conte 3.

variants.name: Lecomte
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Monique, Normand, Alain, Armand, Cecile, Dominique, Francois, Germain, Gilles, Gregoire, Huguette, Pierre.

French and Walloon: nickname for someone in the service of a count or for someone who behaved pretentiously, from Old French conte, cunte ‘count’, with fused masculine definite article le. Compare Comte 1.
History: This surname is listed (in the form Le Comte) in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Eustache
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: Ier
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: and Norwegian vernacular form of   Peter .

variants.name: Peter
meanings: form of the name of the best-known of all Christ's apostles, traditionally regarded as the founder of the Christian Church. The name derives, via Latin, from Greek petros ‘stone, rock’. This is used as a translation of the Aramaic byname Cephas, given to the apostle Simon son of Jona, to distinguish him from another of the same name ( Simon Zelotes ). ‘When Jesus beheld him, he said, Thou art Simon the son of Jona: thou shalt be called Cephas, which is by interpretation, A stone’ (John 1:42). According to Matthew 16:17–18, Christ says more explicitly, ‘Blessed art thou, Simon Bar-jona … thou art Peter, and upon this rock I will build my church’. The name has been in continuous use since the Middle Ages.

en.lifeSummary: When Eustache Ier comte de Boulogne was born on 11 August 1004, in Boulogne-sur-Mer, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, his father, Count Baldwin Of Boulogne II, was 29 and his mother, Adelheid van Gent, was 24. He married Mathilde gravin van Leuven in Brabant, Belgium. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 15 October 1049, in his hometown, at the age of 45, and was buried in Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Eustache Ier comte de Boulogne est né le 11 août 1004, à Boulogne-sur-Mer, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, son père, Count Baldwin Of Boulogne II, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Adelheid van Gent, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Mathilde gravin van Leuven à Brabant, Belgique. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 15 octobre 1049, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 45 ans, et a été enterré à Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Eustache Ier comte de Boulogne am 11. August 1004 in Boulogne-sur-Mer, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Count Baldwin Of Boulogne II 29 und seine Mutter Adelheid van Gent 24. Er hat in Brabant, Belgien Mathilde gravin van Leuven geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 15. Oktober 1049 im Alter von 45 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Eustache Ier comte de Boulogne è nato il il 11 agosto 1004 nel Boulogne-sur-Mer, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, il suo padre, Count Baldwin Of Boulogne II, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Adelheid van Gent, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Mathilde gravin van Leuven nel Brabante, Belgio. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 15 ottobre 1049, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 45 anni, e fu sepolto a Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Eustache Ier comte de Boulogneが1004年8月11日にフランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスプアス-デ-カレイスボウログネ-スル-マーで生まれた時，父Count Baldwin Of Boulogne IIは29歳，母Adelheid van Gentは24歳であった。ベルギーブラバントでMathilde gravin van Leuvenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1049年10月15日に故郷で45歳で死去し，フランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスプアス-デ-カレイスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Eustache Ier comte de Boulogne(이)가 1004년 8월 11일 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 파스-데-캘레이 부로그니-수-머에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Count Baldwin Of Boulogne II(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Adelheid van Gent(은)는 24세였다. 그는 벨기에 브라반트에서 Mathilde gravin van Leuven(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1049년 10월 15일 그의 고향에서 45세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 파스-데-캘레이에 묻혔다.

pt.11 AUG 1004–15 OCT 1049: 11 de agosto de 1004–15 de outubro de 1049
pt.Cuijk, Limburg, Noord-Brabant, Nederland: Cuijk, Brabante do Norte, Países Baixos
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Eustache Ier comte de Boulogne nasceu em 11 de agosto de 1004, em Boulogne-sur-Mer, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França, seu pai, Count Baldwin Of Boulogne II, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Adelheid van Gent, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Mathilde gravin van Leuven em Brabante, Bélgica. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 15 de outubro de 1049, em sua cidade natal, com 45 anos, e foi sepultado em Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Eustache Ier comte de Boulogne родился 11 августа 1004 г. в местности боулогне-сур-мир, пас-де-калеи, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция, его отцу по имени Count Baldwin Of Boulogne II было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Adelheid van Gent, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Mathilde gravin van Leuven в местности брабант, Бельгия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 15 октября 1049 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 45 лет и был похоронен в местности пас-де-калеи, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция.

es.11 AUG 1004–15 OCT 1049: 11 de agosto de 1004–15 de octubre de 1049
es.Cuijk, Limburg, Noord-Brabant, Nederland: Cuijk, Brabante del Norte, Países Bajos
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Eustache Ier comte de Boulogne nació el 11 de agosto de 1004, en Boulogne-sur-Mer, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, su papá, Count Baldwin Of Boulogne II, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Adelheid van Gent, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Mathilde gravin van Leuven en Brabante, Bélgica. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 15 de octubre de 1049, en su pueblo, a la edad de 45 años, y fue sepultado en Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia.
